title: Recipe Robot
short_description: Chef Bolt the robot only cooks if the steps are in the right order — unscramble each recipe into a working algorithm before you hit Cook.
description: Chef Bolt the robot does EXACTLY what you tell him, in exactly the order you say — just like a computer. Tap the scrambled steps to drop them into your program, put them in the right order, then hit Cook. Butter the plate before the bread and you'll get a delicious disaster! It teaches sequencing and debugging: order the steps of an algorithm, spot which ones are out of place, and fix the bug. Grade bands ramp from 3-step recipes, to 4–5 steps, to 6-step sequences with sneaky ordering. A free online coding, sequencing and debugging game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap steps to add them to your program in order, Undo to fix, then Cook.
